name: Sewer Soda
recipeInstructions:
1. Let the ice cream sit at room temperature until it is easy to scoop.
2. Spoon the ice cream into glasses until they are about halfway full.
3. Pour or squeeze approximately 3 tablespoons of chocolate syrup into each glass.
4. Slowly fill almost to the top with club soda and stir well with a spoon.
5. Serve with a straw and a tall spoon for scooping out those delicious brown lumps.
6. Serves 4 sewage slurpers.
Sicko serving suggestion: To make this slop especially disgusting, add an unwrapped Tootsie Roll to each glass.
